message:
fix: gofmt formatting across 24 files and 2 lint warnings (bd-i4o4e)

Run make fmt to fix all gofmt issues. Add nolint directives for:
- G204 (gosec) in cmd/bd/stubs.go: git args are internal, not user-supplied
- unparam in internal/syncbranch/worktree.go: error return kept for callers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,6 @@ import (
 	"fmt"
 	"slices"
 	"strings"
-
 )
 
 type doltAutoCommitParams struct {

@@ -29,7 +29,6 @@ Examples:
 		ctx := rootCtx
 		issueID := args[0]
 
-
 		// Get issue history
 		history, err := store.History(ctx, issueID)
 		if err != nil {

@@ -543,4 +543,3 @@ func printJJAliasInstructions() {
 	fmt.Printf("
Then use %s instead of %s

", ui.RenderAccent("jj push"), ui.RenderAccent("jj git push"))
 	fmt.Printf("For more details, see: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/docs/JUJUTSU.md

")
 }
-

@@ -54,9 +54,9 @@ var (
 )
 var (
 	sandboxMode     bool
-	allowStale      bool          // Use --allow-stale: skip staleness check (emergency escape hatch)
-	readonlyMode    bool          // Read-only mode: block write operations (for worker sandboxes)
-	storeIsReadOnly bool          // Track if store was opened read-only (for staleness checks)
+	allowStale      bool               // Use --allow-stale: skip staleness check (emergency escape hatch)
+	readonlyMode    bool               // Read-only mode: block write operations (for worker sandboxes)
+	storeIsReadOnly bool               // Track if store was opened read-only (for staleness checks)
 	lockTimeout     = 30 * time.Second // Dolt open timeout (fixed default)
 	profileEnabled  bool
 	profileFile     *os.File

@@ -37,7 +37,6 @@ This helps identify:
 		// Direct mode
 		ctx := rootCtx
 
-
 		issues, err := store.GetStaleIssues(ctx, filter)
 		if err != nil {
 			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Error: %v\n", err)

@@ -210,4 +210,3 @@ func (c *Compactor) CompactTier1Batch(ctx context.Context, issueIDs []string) ([
 	wg.Wait()
 	return results, nil
 }
-

@@ -391,8 +391,8 @@ const (
 	StatusBlocked    Status = "blocked"
 	StatusDeferred   Status = "deferred" // Deliberately put on ice for later
 	StatusClosed     Status = "closed"
-	StatusPinned     Status = "pinned"    // Persistent bead that stays open indefinitely
-	StatusHooked     Status = "hooked"    // Work attached to an agent's hook (GUPP)
+	StatusPinned     Status = "pinned" // Persistent bead that stays open indefinitely
+	StatusHooked     Status = "hooked" // Work attached to an agent's hook (GUPP)
 )
 
 // IsValid checks if the status value is valid (built-in statuses only)
@@ -879,7 +879,7 @@ type Statistics struct {
 	BlockedIssues           int     `json:"blocked_issues"`
 	DeferredIssues          int     `json:"deferred_issues"` // Issues on ice
 	ReadyIssues             int     `json:"ready_issues"`
-	PinnedIssues            int     `json:"pinned_issues"`    // Persistent issues
+	PinnedIssues            int     `json:"pinned_issues"` // Persistent issues
 	EpicsEligibleForClosure int     `json:"epics_eligible_for_closure"`
 	AverageLeadTime         float64 `json:"average_lead_time_hours"`
 }
